Class UncorrelatedResultResponseHandler<RequestData, EventT extends SfsResultResponse, HandledT>

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.handling.EventHandler<RequestData, EventT, HandledT>
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.handling.UncorrelatedEventHandler<RequestData, EventT, HandledT>
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.handling.UncorrelatedResultResponseHandler<RequestData, EventT, HandledT>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BuyEggHandler, BuyIslandHandler, BuyStructureHandler, CollectMineHandler, FeedMonsterHandler, FlipMonsterHandler, FlipStructureHandler, GetFriendsHandler, MoveMonsterHandler, MoveStructureHandler, MultiMonsterUpdateHandler, MuteMonsterHandler, RequestFriendHandler, VisitFriendHandler
public abstract class UncorrelatedResultResponseHandler<RequestData, EventT extends SfsResultResponse, HandledT> extends UncorrelatedEventHandler<RequestData, EventT, HandledT>
